title: Training Composer 2
summary: Cursor's Composer 2 is trained on Kimi K2.5 as a base model with continued coding-focused pre-training and long-horizon reinforcement learning with auto-install capabilities. The model uses reward shaping with nonlinear length penalties and self-summarization to manage context limits during training and inference.
